title: athyrium sororium
intro: Athyrium sororium, also known as Lady fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia, particularly in China, Japan, and Korea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Athyrium sororium include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Athyrium sororium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
